summary: Full async conversion of tool-usage-tracker.js hot-path functions. Added writeJsonAsync with atomic tmp+rename and serialized write queue (_writePromise chain). Added initAsync with _initPromise singleton. All 7 hot-path functions converted to async. trackEvent calls now fire-and-forget with .catch(). Sync helpers renamed to *Sync with @deprecated.
notes: writeJsonAsync uses atomic tmp+rename with Windows EPERM fallback (direct write). Write queue serializes file writes via _writePromise chain (audit-logger.js pattern). initAsync uses _initPromise singleton (prevents concurrent init races). 20 regression tests added. 28/28 learning-engine tests pass, 331 model-manager tests pass, 5 health-check tests pass. Zero sync fs calls on hot paths (only deprecated wrappers). module.exports shape unchanged.
